full_description: Watch the green target block move out of view, follow its movement direction to find it, then pick it up.
schema: {A} denotes the moving target object, {B} denotes stationary distractor objects, {a} denotes the arm used to pick the object, {d} denotes the observed movement direction
preference: Mention observing the target's movement direction before searching for the moved object.
seen: Watch {A} move {d}, then look along that direction and pick it up with {a}.
Track the movement direction of {A}, find it after it moves away, and grasp it.
Observe where the green block goes, follow the {d} motion, then pick up {A}.
Use the motion of {A} to search in the right direction before grasping it.
After {A} leaves the current view, turn toward its {d} movement and collect it.
unseen: Follow the moving target block and pick it up.
Find the green block by tracking the direction it moved.
Look in the direction the target moved, then grasp it.
look at the target block at its starting position
watch the target leave the current view

seen: search along the {d} motion direction to find {A}
unseen: turn toward where the target moved

seen: pick up the moved target with {a}
unseen: grasp the target after tracking it
